text:
On Mon, 2 Aug 1999 wghicks@bellsouth.net wrote:

> --- ports/devel/bison.orig/pkg/COMMENT	Sun May  2 23:18:08 1999
> +++ ports/devel/bison/pkg/COMMENT	Mon Aug  2 22:06:34 1999
> @@ -1 +1 @@
> -GNU's bison (ver 1.27)
> +GNU's bison (ver 1.28)

Version numbers in COMMENT is silly, the package already contains the
version number.
